claims: The skill description lists "Bash" as an allowed tool without any scope or restriction. A code documentation analyzer typically only needs to read and analyze code/documentation files, not execute arbitrary system commands, which could lead to privilege escalation, data exfiltration, or system modifications unrelated to documentation analysis. This broad permission is excessive and creates significant security risks.
